testcase.name: test_01_login_and_get_user
testcase.failure: tests/test_mining_claim_flow.py:40: in test_01_login_and_get_user assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["query","identifier"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["query","password"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_02_get_mining_status_initial
testcase.failure: tests/test_mining_claim_flow.py:59: in test_02_get_mining_status_initial assert response.status_code == 200, f"Mining status failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Mining status failed: {"detail":"User not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_mining_status_response_structure
testcase.failure: tests/test_mining_claim_flow.py:268: in test_mining_status_response_structure assert login_resp.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_mining_start_response_structure
testcase.failure: tests/test_mining_claim_flow.py:301: in test_mining_start_response_structure assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_mining_claim_response_structure
testcase.failure: tests/test_mining_claim_flow.py:329: in test_mining_claim_response_structure assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
